caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain in Barbados, Gale Force Winds Near Roatan
caribbean.paragraph: Barbados (Lesser Antilles) is under heavy rain with 100% rain probability, easterly winds around 16 kt and seas to 5.8 ft with a dominant E swell at 7 s. I am monitoring Roatan where sustained winds near 37 kt are producing gale‑force conditions and rough seas for western Caribbean mariners.

mediterranean.headline: Westerly 24 kt winds churn Mykonos seas
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing westerly winds up to 24 kt with seas to 5.4 ft and a dominant W swell period near 6 s, with less than 10% rain probability. I expect conditions to remain choppy for small craft around Mykonos while Cadiz holds lighter 12 kt breezes and relatively calmer seas.
